Klasse MidiInterface

java.lang.Object
de.btu.kt.syx.util.MidiInterface
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
ILogger
public class MidiInterface extends Object implements ILogger
A physical or virtual MIDI interface with a MIDI in and a MIDI out device.
Autor:
Matthias Wolff

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    MidiInterface(String name)
    Creates a new MIDI interface.
    MidiInterface(String name, int verbose)
    Creates a new MIDI interface.
    MidiInterface(String name, MidiDevice mdOut, MidiDevice mdIn, int verbose)
    Creates a new MIDI interface.

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    void

    Adds a system exclusive message listener to this MIDI interface.

    Closes the MIDI out and in ports.
    void

    Closes the MIDI in port (only).
    void

    Closes the MIDI out port (only).

    Finds a MIDI in port by the MIDI device name.

    Finds a MIDI out port by the MIDI device name.

    Returns the ID of this logger (max. 8 characters).

    Returns the MIDI in device of this interface.

    Returns the name of this MIDI interface.
    int

    Returns the verbose level of this logger.

    Returns true if the MIDI in port is open, false otherwise.
    boolean

    Returns true if the MIDI out port is open, false otherwise.

    Opens the MIDI out and in ports.
    void

    Opens the MIDI in port (only).

    Opens the MIDI out port (only).

    Prints MIDI device information to a string.

    Lists available MIDI devices to a string.

    Removes a system exclusive message listener from this MIDI interface.

    Resets this MIDI interface.
    void

    Sends a MIDI message through the out port of this interface.

    Sets a AMidiMonitor to log MIDI input and output to.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • MidiInterface

      public MidiInterface(String name, MidiDevice mdOut, MidiDevice mdIn, int verbose)
      Creates a new MIDI interface.
      Parameter:
      name - The device name
      mdOut - The MIDI output device
      mdIn - The MIDI input device
      verbose - The verbose level

    • MidiInterface

      public MidiInterface(String name, int verbose) throws MidiUnavailableException
      Creates a new MIDI interface. Invokes findMidiOutPort(java.lang.String) and findMidiInPort(java.lang.String) with argument name to assign the MIDI out and in ports.
      Parameter:
      name - The device name.
      verbose - The verbose level.
      Löst aus:
      MidiUnavailableException - if the in and/or ports cannot be found or accessed.
      Siehe auch:
      • findMidiOutPort(java.lang.String)
      • findMidiInPort(java.lang.String)
      • printMidiDeviceList()

    • MidiInterface

      public MidiInterface(String name) throws MidiUnavailableException
      Creates a new MIDI interface. Invokes findMidiOutPort(java.lang.String) and findMidiInPort(java.lang.String) with argument name to assign the MIDI out and in ports.
      Parameter:
      name - The device name.
      Löst aus:
      MidiUnavailableException - if the in and/or ports cannot be found or accessed.
      Siehe auch:
      • findMidiOutPort(java.lang.String)
      • findMidiInPort(java.lang.String)
      • printMidiDeviceList()

  • Methodendetails

    • open

      public void open() throws MidiUnavailableException, MidiUnavailableException
      Opens the MIDI out and in ports.
      Löst aus:
      MidiUnavailableException - if the port(s) cannot be opened due to resource restrictions.
      MidiUnavailableException - if the port(s) cannot be opened.
      SecurityException - if the port(s) cannot be opened due to security restrictions.
      Siehe auch:
      • reset()
      • close()
      • openOutPort()
      • openInPort()

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes the MIDI out and in ports.
      Siehe auch:
      • open()
      • reset()
      • closeOutPort()
      • closeInPort()

    • reset

      public void reset() throws MidiUnavailableException, MidiUnavailableException
      Resets this MIDI interface.
      Löst aus:
      MidiUnavailableException - if the port(s) cannot be opened due to resource restrictions.
      MidiUnavailableException - if the port(s) cannot be opened.
      SecurityException - if the port(s) cannot be opened due to security restrictions.
      Siehe auch:
      • open()
      • close()
      • closeOutPort()
      • closeInPort()

    • openOutPort

      public void openOutPort() throws MidiUnavailableException
      Opens the MIDI out port (only).
      Löst aus:
      MidiUnavailableException - if the device cannot be opened due to resource restrictions.
      SecurityException - if the device cannot be opened due to security restrictions.
      Siehe auch:
      • closeOutPort()
      • open()

    • closeOutPort

      public void closeOutPort()
      Closes the MIDI out port (only).
      Siehe auch:
      • openOutPort()
      • close()

    • openInPort

      public void openInPort() throws MidiUnavailableException, MidiUnavailableException
      Opens the MIDI in port (only).
      Löst aus:
      MidiUnavailableException - if the device cannot be opened due to resource restrictions.
      MidiUnavailableException - if the device cannot be opened.
      SecurityException - if the device cannot be opened due to security restrictions.
      Siehe auch:
      • closeInPort()
      • open()

    • closeInPort

      public void closeInPort()
      Closes the MIDI in port (only).
      Siehe auch:
      • openInPort()
      • close()

    • send

      public void send(MidiMessage message) throws MidiUnavailableException
      Sends a MIDI message through the out port of this interface.
      Parameter:
      message - The MIDI message to send.
      Löst aus:
      MidiUnavailableException - if the out port is closed.

    • addSysExListener

      public void addSysExListener(ISysexMessageListener listener)
      Adds a system exclusive message listener to this MIDI interface.
      Parameter:
      listener - The listener.

    • removeSysExListener

      public void removeSysExListener(ISysexMessageListener listener)
      Removes a system exclusive message listener from this MIDI interface.
      Parameter:
      listener - The listener.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of this MIDI interface.

    • isOutPortOpen

      public boolean isOutPortOpen()
      Returns true if the MIDI out port is open, false otherwise.

    • isInPortOpen

      public boolean isInPortOpen()
      Returns true if the MIDI in port is open, false otherwise.

    • setMonitor

      public void setMonitor(AMidiMonitor monitor)
      Sets a AMidiMonitor to log MIDI input and output to.
      Parameter:
      monitor - The monitor, can be null

    • getMidiInDevice

      public MidiDevice getMidiInDevice()
      Returns the MIDI in device of this interface.

    • getMidiOutDevice

      public MidiDevice getMidiOutDevice()
      Returns the MIDI out device of this interface.

    • findMidiOutPort

      public static MidiDevice findMidiOutPort(String name) throws MidiUnavailableException
      Finds a MIDI out port by the MIDI device name.
      Parameter:
      name - The name of the MIDI device.
      Gibt zurück:
      The MidiDevice representing the MIDI out port.
      Löst aus:
      MidiUnavailableException - if the port cannot be found or accessed.

    • findMidiInPort

      public static MidiDevice findMidiInPort(String name) throws MidiUnavailableException
      Finds a MIDI in port by the MIDI device name.
      Parameter:
      name - The name of the MIDI device.
      Gibt zurück:
      The MidiDevice representing the MIDI in port.
      Löst aus:
      MidiUnavailableException - if the port cannot be found or accessed.

    • printMidiDeviceInfo

      public static String printMidiDeviceInfo(MidiDevice.Info mdi)
      Prints MIDI device information to a string.
      Parameter:
      mdi - The MidiDevice.Info
      Gibt zurück:
      The printed string

    • printMidiDeviceList

      public static String printMidiDeviceList()
      Lists available MIDI devices to a string.
      Gibt zurück:
      The printed string

    • getVerbose

      public int getVerbose()
      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: ILogger
      Returns the verbose level of this logger. Log messages

      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: ILogger
      Returns the ID of this logger (max. 8 characters).
